channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iraqis celebrates US-Iran ceasefire as two-week halt in war begins
item.description: Celebrations have erupted in Iraq following the announcement of a two-week ceasefire between Iran and the US.

item.title: Climate activist Greta Thunberg slams Trump’s threats against Iran
item.description: Polls have found that young people in the United States are more sceptical of foreign intervention and war on Iran.

item.title: Oil prices slide, stocks surge as Trump announces two-week Iran ceasefire
item.description: Investors welcome the possible resumption of oil and gas flows through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Iran says talks with US will begin in Pakistan’s Islamabad on Friday
item.description: Tehran says the negotiations will be based on its 10-point proposal, which calls for control over Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Iran agrees to open Strait of Hormuz for two-week US ceasefire
item.description: Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says ‘if attacks against Iran are halted,’ then Iran agrees to a US ceasefire.

item.title: White House confirms two-week suspension of strikes on Iran
item.description: The White House has confirmed the US has agreed to suspend all bombing and military attacks on Iran for two weeks.

item.title: Trump agrees to pause attacks on Iran if Strait of Hormuz opens
item.description: US President Donald Trump says he has agreed to extend his threatened deadline to attack Iran by two weeks.

item.title: Trump announces two-week ceasefire as Iran agrees to reopen Hormuz Strait
item.description: Iran has said that safe passage through Hormuz will be possible through coordination with its armed forces.

item.title: What we know about Pakistan’s proposed Iran war pause
item.description: Pakistan’s Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif says diplomatic efforts to resolve the US-Israeli war on Iran are progressing.

item.title: Iranian musician stages protest at power station over Trump threats
item.description: Iranian musician Ali Ghamsari has been performing outside the Damavand power station in a symbolic protest.
